title: betonica recta
intro: Betonica recta, also known as wood betony, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. Its medicinal properties include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and nervine, which makes it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of wood betony include relief from headaches, migraines, and anxiety, as well as its ability to improve cognitive function and memory. Wood betony can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used to treat a range of ailments.
